products.name: Velvet Royale Sofa
products.description: A luxurious three-seater sofa upholstered in premium velvet fabric with gold-finished legs. Perfect for elegant living rooms.
products.styleNotes: Pairs beautifully with minimalist coffee tables and metallic accents. The deep navy velvet creates a bold focal point in neutral-toned rooms.

products.name: Artisan Wooden Coffee Table
products.description: Hand-crafted solid wood coffee table with intricate carvings. A timeless piece for your living space.
products.styleNotes: The warm wood tones complement both traditional and contemporary interiors. Add a coffee table book and a small plant for a styled look.

products.name: Golden Lotus Vase
products.description: An exquisite ceramic vase with gold-leaf lotus motifs. Adds a touch of opulence to any room.
products.styleNotes: Display with dried pampas grass or fresh lilies on a console table for maximum impact.

products.name: Monstera Deliciosa Plant
products.description: A stunning tropical monstera plant in a handmade ceramic pot. Brings life and freshness to your interiors.
products.styleNotes: Place near a bright window. The dramatic split leaves create beautiful shadow patterns on walls.

products.name: Heritage Brass Candle Stand
products.description: Traditional brass candle stand with an antique finish. Perfect for festive decorations and ambient lighting.
products.styleNotes: Group with other brass pieces on a mantel for a cohesive, heritage-inspired display.

products.name: Minimalist Bookshelf
products.description: A sleek, wall-mounted bookshelf in matte black finish. Modern design meets functional storage.
products.styleNotes: Mix books with small sculptures and trailing plants for an artful, layered look.

products.name: Aromatic Gift Hamper
products.description: Curated gift box with scented candles, essential oils, and decorative accessories. Perfect for housewarming gifts.
products.styleNotes: An ideal gift for housewarmings, festivals, or special occasions that shows you care about quality.

products.name: Fiddle Leaf Fig
products.description: A lush fiddle leaf fig in a designer ceramic pot. The perfect statement plant for modern homes.
products.styleNotes: Position in a bright corner. The large, violin-shaped leaves add instant sophistication.

products.name: Wall Art Canvas – Abstract Gold
products.description: Premium abstract canvas with gold and beige tones. Hand-stretched on wooden frame, ready to hang.
products.styleNotes: Hang as a statement piece above a sofa or console. The metallic flecks catch light beautifully.

products.name: Luxury Dining Table Set
products.description: A 6-seater dining table with matching chairs in premium teak wood with marble inlay.
products.styleNotes: The marble inlay creates a stunning centrepiece. Pair with linen placemats and brass cutlery for complete elegance.

products.name: Decorative Table Lamp
products.description: Elegant table lamp with gold geometric base and cream linen shade. Creates warm ambient lighting.
products.styleNotes: Perfect bedside companion or study desk accent. The warm glow creates a cozy reading atmosphere.

products.name: Jade Succulent Terrarium
products.description: A beautiful glass terrarium with assorted succulents. Low maintenance, high style.
products.styleNotes: Place on a windowsill or desk. The miniature garden brings calm and natural beauty to small spaces.

products.name: Marble Console Table
products.description: A stunning console table with white marble top and brushed gold legs. The perfect entryway statement.
products.styleNotes: Style with a mirror above and decorative objects on top for a grand entryway moment.

products.name: Crystal Chandelier – Petite
products.description: A petite crystal chandelier that adds sparkle and glamour. Perfect for dining rooms and bedrooms.
products.styleNotes: Hang over a dining table at 75-80cm above the surface for optimal light distribution and drama.

products.name: Handwoven Jute Rug
products.description: Natural jute area rug with geometric patterns. Eco-friendly and beautifully textured.
products.styleNotes: Layer over hardwood floors under a dining table or in a living room to add warmth and texture.

products.name: Scented Candle Trio
products.description: Set of three premium scented candles: Sandalwood, Jasmine, and Vanilla. Hand-poured soy wax.
products.styleNotes: Arrange on a decorative tray in the bathroom or bedroom for a spa-like atmosphere.

products.name: Antique Brass Photo Frame Set
products.description: Set of 3 antique-finish brass photo frames in varying sizes. Add personal touches to any shelf.
products.styleNotes: Create a gallery wall or display on a console table alongside greenery for a curated look.

products.name: Modern Accent Chair
products.description: A mid-century modern accent chair with bouclé upholstery and walnut wood legs. Statement seating.
products.styleNotes: Place in a reading nook with a small side table and floor lamp for the perfect retreat.

products.name: Snake Plant – Large
products.description: A tall snake plant (Sansevieria) in a sleek white pot. Known for air purification qualities.
products.styleNotes: Place in a bedroom or office corner. Virtually indestructible and filters indoor air naturally.

products.name: Ceramic Dinner Set – 12 Pcs
products.description: Premium bone china dinner set with gold rim detailing. 12-piece set for elegant dining.
products.styleNotes: Elevate everyday meals. The gold rim catches candlelight for memorable dinner parties.

products.name: Ottoman Storage Pouf
products.description: A velvet-upholstered ottoman with hidden storage. Doubles as extra seating and a coffee table.
products.styleNotes: Add a tray on top for drinks or place at the foot of a bed for added luxury.

products.name: Macramé Wall Hanging – XL
products.description: Large hand-knotted cotton macramé wall hanging. Adds bohemian texture and visual interest.
products.styleNotes: Hang above a bed headboard or in a hallway to create a focal point with natural texture.

products.name: Luxury Bedside Table
products.description: A contemporary bedside table with marble top and brushed gold legs. Two soft-close drawers.
products.styleNotes: Pair two symmetrically on either side of a bed. Top with a lamp and small plant for balance.

products.name: Peace Lily in Premium Pot
products.description: Elegant peace lily with white blooms in a handcrafted terracotta pot. A symbol of serenity.
products.styleNotes: Thrives in low light. Place in a bathroom or office for air purification and calming vibes.
